note: Advanced Band method book — really a warm-up / technique source (all major + most common minor keys, musical common practice, tuning) rather than a line-by-line homework spine.
layout: Every MAJOR key is a 2-page spread with the SAME layout: the EVEN page holds lines 1-6 (scale/technique — articulation & fingering transitions), the ODD page holds lines 7-10. Titles #1-8 and #10 are identical for every key; only #9 (a repertoire etude) and the page pair change per key.
percussion: Snare drum book: lines 1-6 are snare exercises, 7-9 are tacet, and 10 is actually a timpani part. Mallet book: lines 1-10 are all available, same as a wind player.

line_notes.6: sixteenth-note scale pattern, slurring + tonguing, in 4/4
line_notes.9: variable repertoire etude — a different title in every key

todo: Fill in the remaining keys (pages + the #9 title for each) once the actual Table of Contents can be scanned. Adding a key = appending one row to "keys"; the rest of each key's 10 lines is generated from common_lines.
